description: <each> empty->non-empty teardown (§42; the 6nz teardown bug surface). Starting empty (fallback shown), one add appends an item; the <empty> fallback (#empty-row) is torn down and one .row replaces it.
rationale: §42 the empty->non-empty transition must remove the <empty> fallback and mount the first row (the historic 6nz teardown bug). After one add: #empty-row absent, .row count 1.
